hubBlurb: Choose a subject and start practicing.

blurbs.math: Addition, subtraction, multiplication, division, and more.
blurbs.geometry: Shapes, angles, perimeter, area, volume, and more.
blurbs.science: Body, animals, plants, space, matter, weather, and forces.

hubSubtitle: Consistency pays off — the more you play, the more coins you earn.

math.howToLearnBlurb: The goal is to practice math in a fun way, matched to grade, topic, and difficulty.
math.pickRowOrColumn: Pick a row or column to practice:

steps.howToApproach: Step 2: How do we approach it?
steps.solveByRules: We'll solve using the rules for this topic.

howToLearnSteps.step1: Choose grade, difficulty, and operation (addition, subtraction, multiplication, division, fractions, percentages, and more).
howToLearnSteps.step2: Choose a game mode: learning, challenge with timer and lives, speed, or marathon.
howToLearnSteps.step3: Read each question carefully — some are word problems where you need to understand the story.
howToLearnSteps.step4: High scores, answer streaks, stars, and badges help you level up as a player.

math.referenceBoardBlurb: Pick a category to review key operations, formulas, and terms in math.

fractions.title: 🔢 Fractions
fractions.desc: A number that represents part of a whole: 1/2, 3/4

even.title: 🔢 Even number
even.desc: A number divisible by 2 with no remainder (2, 4, 6, 8…)

odd.title: 🔢 Odd number
odd.desc: A number not divisible by 2 with no remainder (1, 3, 5, 7…)

prime.title: 🔢 Prime number
prime.desc: A number divisible only by 1 and itself (2, 3, 5, 7, 11…)

fraction.title: 🔢 Fraction
fraction.desc: A number representing part of a whole (1/2, 3/4, 2/3…)

geometry.howToLearnBlurb: The goal is to practice geometry in a fun way, matched to grade, topic, and difficulty.

howToLearnSteps.step1: Choose grade, difficulty, and topic (area, perimeter, volume, angles, Pythagoras, and more).
howToLearnSteps.step2: Choose a game mode: learning, challenge with timer and lives, speed, or marathon.
howToLearnSteps.step3: Read each question carefully — some are word problems about gardens, fences, and boxes.
howToLearnSteps.step4: High scores, answer streaks, stars, and badges help you level up as a player.

geometry.referenceBoardBlurb: Pick a category to review shapes, formulas, and key geometry terms.

rectangle.title: ⬜ Rectangle
rectangle.desc: 2 pairs of equal sides, 4 right angles

circle.title: ⭕ Circle
circle.desc: Round shape; all points are the same distance from the center

cube.title: 🔲 Cube
cube.desc: A box where all edges are equal

area.title: 📐 Area
area.desc: The space a shape covers on a flat surface

perimeter.title: 📏 Perimeter
perimeter.desc: The length of the line around a shape

volume.title: 📦 Volume
volume.desc: The space a 3D object takes up

angle.title: 📐 Angle
angle.desc: The space between two rays from the same point

perpendicular.title: 📐 Perpendicular lines
perpendicular.desc: Lines that meet at a right angle

diagonal.title: 📐 Diagonal
diagonal.desc: A line connecting two non-adjacent corners

symmetry.title: 📐 Symmetry
symmetry.desc: When a shape looks the same on both sides

errors.invalidGrade: Invalid grade. Please choose another grade.
errors.noTopics: No topics available for this grade. Please choose another grade.
errors.noQuestions: No questions available for the selected topic and grade.
errors.generateError: Error generating question. Please try again or choose another topic.

steps.wordIsEnglish: We see that "{word}" is in English.
steps.findHebrewMeaning: Find the Hebrew meaning of the word.
steps.checkMeaning: Check that the meaning makes sense.
steps.wordIsHebrew: We see that "{word}" is in Hebrew.
steps.findEnglishMeaning: Find the English meaning of the word.
steps.grammarAmIsAre: I = am, You/We/They = are, He/She/It = is.
steps.translatePiece: Try translating each word or part.
steps.buildHebrewSentence: Put the words together into a Hebrew sentence.
steps.buildEnglishSentence: Put the words together into an English sentence.
steps.whatIsMissing: Figure out what is missing — which word or grammar form.
steps.grammarCheck: Check what fits the grammar rules: I/You/We/They = are, He/She/It = is.
steps.spellingLetterByLetter: Write letter by letter and watch spelling.
steps.breakIntoParts: Break the sentence into parts and think how to say each in English.
steps.checkWordOrder: Check word order and a capital letter at the start.

mistakes.checkMeaningLearning: The correct answer is "{answer}". Check again: does your meaning match the word?
mistakes.checkMeaning: Check again: does your meaning match the word?
mistakes.iAmNotIs: Remember: I always uses am, not is. I am = I.
mistakes.amOnlyWithI: Remember: am is only with I. He/She/It = is, You/We/They = are.
mistakes.checkGrammarLearning: The correct answer is "{answer}". Check the grammar rules again: I am, You/We/They are, He/She/It is.
mistakes.checkGrammar: Check the grammar rules again: I am, You/We/They are, He/She/It is.
mistakes.checkTranslationLearning: Correct translation: {answer}. Check again: did you translate every word correctly?
mistakes.checkTranslation: Check again: did you translate every word correctly?
mistakes.checkWordFitLearning: The correct answer is "{answer}". Check again: does your word fit the sentence?
mistakes.checkWordFit: Check again: does your word fit the sentence?
mistakes.checkSpellingLearning: The correct answer is "{answer}". You may have misspelled it — check letter by letter.
mistakes.checkSpelling: You may have misspelled it — check letter by letter.
mistakes.checkMeaningContext: Check again: does your meaning match the word? Think about the word in Hebrew/English based on context.

audio.maxReplays: You reached the maximum listens for this question.
audio.playFailed: Cannot play right now. Try again or continue with the text.

science.howToLearnBlurb: The goal is to practice science in a fun way, matched to grade, topic, and difficulty.

respiratory.desc: Brings oxygen into the body and removes carbon dioxide.

photosynthesis.desc: Process where plants make food using light.

foodWeb.desc: Network of food chains showing how energy moves in nature.

adaptations.desc: Body or behavior changes that help survival.

waterCycle.desc: Path of water between sea, clouds, and land.

crust.desc: Outer rocky layer with tectonic plates.

planet.desc: Body orbiting a star, e.g. Earth or Mars.

states.desc: Solid, liquid, and gas — different forms of the same material.

mixtureCompound.desc: Mixture — blended without chemical bond; compound — strong bond.

renewable.desc: Sources like sun and wind that do not run out.

physicalChange.desc: Change in shape or state without making a new substance.

hints.body: Check again: what is the role of the system or organ? How does it help the body?
hints.animals: Ask yourself: where does the animal live? What does it eat? What are its features?
hints.plants: Remember plant parts and roles: root, stem, leaves, flowers.
hints.materials: Think about state of matter and material properties (solid/liquid/gas, solubility, etc.).
hints.earth_space: Remember: Earth has steady motions (rotation and orbit around the Sun).
hints.environment: Decide whether the action helps or harms the environment (pollution, waste, recycling).
hints.experiments: Think like a scientist: what happens in the experiment? Cause and result?
hints.genericRetry: Think again using the question wording and the "What to remember?" list above — don't guess too fast.
hints.genericCheck: Check the data and explanation you learned again.

steps.understand: 1. First understand the question — what topic is it about?
steps.onlyMatch: {num}. Of all the options, only "{answer}" matches the explanation.

insights.accuracyRising: Accuracy trend in recent streak is rising.
insights.accuracyFalling: Accuracy trend in recent streak is falling — review the material.

howToLearnSteps.step1: Choose grade, level, and topic (e.g. human body, plants, animals, and more).
howToLearnSteps.step2: Choose a game mode: learning, challenge with timer and lives, speed, or marathon.
howToLearnSteps.step3: Answer multiple-choice, true/false, and experiment-style questions.
howToLearnSteps.step4: Build answer streaks and earn stars and XP points.

science.safety: Always follow lab safety rules. Ask an adult before experiments at home.
